label: 192, 192a Repealed. , (b), ,Pub. L. 91–412, § 3(a)84 Stat. 864Sept. 25, 1970
notes: Section 192, acts , ; , , which provided for deposit of moneys received for special statistical studies, compilations, and transcripts in a special account for payment of ordinary expenses incidental to the work and services of nongovernmental individuals and had originally provided for covering into the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts moneys received in payment of photographic and other mechanical reproduction of special statistical compilations from the records, is now covered by .Mar. 1, 1919, ch. 86, § 140 Stat. 1256May 27, 1935, ch. 148, § 249 Stat. 293section 1526 of this title

Section 192a, acts , ; , , required Secretary of Commerce to prescribe rules and regulations governing special statistical studies.May 27, 1935, ch. 148, § 349 Stat. 293Aug. 7, 1946, ch. 770, § 1(4)60 Stat. 866
